# Vidhima Construction Private Limited

> Class-I registered construction company in Palampur, Kangra, Himachal Pradesh. Builds homes, commercial buildings, and executes government contracts across Kangra district and HP.

## Company

- Legal name: Vidhima Construction Private Limited
- Registration: Class-I contractor, Himachal Pradesh
- Contact: +91 86289 89364 | vidhimaho@gmail.com
- Address: Near SSB Chowk, Palampur, Kangra, Himachal Pradesh 176061
- Hours: Mon–Sat 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

## Services

- Residential house construction (RCC, seismic-safe, hill terrain)
- Commercial building construction
- Government contract execution (roads, public buildings, civic works)
- Sub-contracting for larger contractors
- Free site visit within 20 km of Palampur office

## Service Area

Palampur, Kangra, Dharamshala, Baijnath, Nurpur, Hamirpur, and across Himachal Pradesh.

## Content

- Blog: construction cost guides, HP hill terrain building tips, project case studies
- Projects: completed residential and commercial constructions in Kangra district
- FAQ: construction process, timelines, pricing, seismic standards for HP
